dsl_rule.translation_notes: Spring pattern detected by: (1) intrabar dip below support (s1 pivot level) via low < s1, (2) recovery back above support by close via close > s1, (3) volume confirmation via vol_ratio_20 > 1.0. Exit at prior resistance using pivot as reference level. Stop loss placed below spring bar low at 2% as standard risk. Base establishment is regime filter (RANGING). Position size threshold left parameterizable as requested.

backtest_rule.reason: Spring pattern detected by: (1) intrabar dip below support (s1 pivot level) via low < s1, (2) recovery back above support by close via close > s1, (3) volume confirmation via vol_ratio_20 > 1.0. Exit at prior resistance using pivot as reference level. Stop loss placed below spring bar low at 2% as standard risk. Base establishment is regime filter (RANGING). Position size threshold left parameterizable as requested.

source_rule_text: Enter long positions on the close of bars that show springs (sharp dips below support that immediately recover back above support level) within an established range/base, capitalizing on the recovery momentum while obtaining favorable entry prices near support.
